film.title: Coco
film.theme: Día de los Muertos, Mexican culture, family, music, remembrance, memory and grief
film.style: 3D animation, vibrant warm color palette, Mexican cultural details, marigold petals, papel picado decorations
film.setting: Santa Cecilia, Mexico (Land of the Living) and the Land of the Dead
film.visual_characteristics: rich textures, warm lighting, cultural authenticity, smooth character shading, detailed costumes, rounded soft silhouettes

miguel.appearance: slim pre-teen boy, warm medium-brown Mexican complexion, short dark brown/black straight hair with messy bangs, large brown expressive eyes, rounded cheeks, soft jawline, small nose and mouth
miguel.outfit_default: red zip-up hoodie (often unzipped), white sleeveless tank top underneath, faded blue jeans, worn off-white sneakers
miguel.personality: passionate about music, talented and determined, creative and resourceful, loving but conflicted with family, stubborn when pursuing dreams
miguel.distinctive_features: hand-made white guitar with skull-shaped headstock, red hoodie, expressive brown eyes, youthful energy, animated facial expressions
visual_variants: human_everyday: neutral/warm daylight, simpler backgrounds in Santa Cecilia
human_facepaint: white skull face paint with dark eye sockets, festival lighting
skeleton_form: exposed bones with clothes on top, skull retains expressive eyes and eyebrows, elastic movements
performance: spotlight lighting, strong stage colors, dynamic poses mid-song
emotional_range: excited/awestruck arriving at Land of the Dead
defiant/angry arguing about music or confronting Ernesto
grief/vulnerability risking losing Héctor or when Coco doesn't remember
joyful performance in final song to Mamá Coco

hector.appearance: skeletal form with visible bones, thin and scrappy build, tattered clothing (worn vest, torn purple jacket), straw hat, bony structure, empty eye sockets with glowing effects, missing tooth
hector.outfit_default: patched clothes, straw sombrero hat, loose brown vest, purple pants, tattered appearance
hector.personality: charming and witty, caring father figure, trickster with loyalty, loving but erased from family memory
hector.distinctive_features: skeleton anatomy, tattered clothes, straw hat, guitar, expressive skull face despite lacking flesh, purple jacket
emotional_range: deep emotional pain about being forgotten

ernesto.age: adult (appears 40s in life, skeleton in afterlife)
ernesto.appearance: tall and handsome (in life), charismatic, slicked-back dark hair, white mariachi outfit with gold trim (in life), skeleton form in Land of the Dead with same outfit
ernesto.outfit_default: white mariachi suit with gold embroidery, glamorous stage attire
ernesto.personality: charming but narcissistic, fame-obsessed, manipulative and deceptive, hides murder and plagiarism
ernesto.distinctive_features: white suit with gold embroidery, guitars, confident posture, glamorous appearance, stadium and TV backdrops, broad shoulders
ernesto.visual_design_note: sharper, pointier shapes for antagonistic character (vs rounded shapes of sympathetic characters)

imelda.age: elderly (appears 70s in life, skeleton in afterlife)
imelda.appearance: tall skeleton woman, purple and orange dress (Day of the Dead colors), black hair with white streaks (in life), stern but caring facial expression, regal bearing
imelda.outfit_default: purple dress, family matriarch clothing, marigold flower accessories
imelda.personality: strict but loving, protective of family, strong-willed, talented shoemaker, initially anti-music but softens
imelda.distinctive_features: purple dress, skeleton form, regal posture, marigold flower accessories, family matriarch presence, apron, dramatic eye sockets

coco.appearance: wrinkled elderly woman, soft design, wheelchair-bound, warm features reflecting age and dementia
coco.personality: loving great-grandmother, holds key memory of Héctor, represents memory and connection across generations
coco.distinctive_features: wheelchair, very elderly appearance, soft warm lighting in scenes, intimate close-ups with Miguel
coco.emotional_importance: scenes with Coco embody memory, affection, and the film's message about remembrance

dante.appearance: Xoloitzcuintli (Mexican hairless dog), purple tongue, mismatched ears, skinny build, goofy expression
dante.personality: loyal to Miguel, playful and goofy, protective spirit guide
dante.distinctive_features: hairless dog, purple tongue, lanky build, transforms into alebrije (winged spirit guide with vibrant colors) in Land of the Dead

lighting: Land of the Dead: saturated purples, blues, greens with bright accent lights, night scenes
Santa Cecilia: soft natural daylight, dusty textures
cultural_elements: ofrendas (altars) with portraits, candles, favorite foods
Day of the Dead face makeup

world_design.santa_cecilia: humble architecture, warm earth tones, markets and plazas, family shoe workshop, soft natural lighting
world_design.land_of_the_dead: towering vertical city of stacked colonial facades and neon signage, highly saturated colors, glowing marigolds, complex volumetric lighting, skeletal citizens in varied outfits

caption_guidelines.prefix_template: a 3d animated character from Pixar's Coco (2017), {character_name}, {appearance_details}, smooth shading, vibrant colors, Mexican cultural style
context_suggestions: in Land of the Dead city

character_design_notes.sympathetic_characters: rounded, soft silhouettes (Miguel, family, Héctor) for warmth and approachability
character_design_notes.antagonistic_characters: sharper, pointier shapes (Ernesto) for subtle discomfort

augmentation_policy.brightness_adjustment: minimal (preserve cultural color accuracy and warm lighting)

segmentation_strategy.foreground: separate LoRA per character, consider separate labels for Miguel's human/facepaint/skeleton forms
background_style_layers: Santa Cecilia streets and plazas (warm daylight, markets, shoe shop)
Land of the Dead cityscapes, marigold bridge, stadiums, talent-show stages
Ofrendas and cemetery sequences for lighting and emotional tone

frame_selection_guidelines: prioritize sharp, well-lit frames with clear silhouettes and readable facial expressions
capture broad range of poses and emotions: walking, playing guitar, arguing, crying, performing
for culturally dense scenes (ofrendas, cemetery), keep variations in angle and distance
avoid heavy motion blur from fast musical numbers unless targeting motion/blur aesthetics

metadata.notes: Character configurations for Pixar's Coco (2017). Built from official project documentation including character profiles and film overview. Optimized for 3D character LoRA training with cultural authenticity and Mexican Día de los Muertos aesthetic. Coco 2 sequel confirmed for 2029 theatrical release.
metadata.awards: Academy Award for Best Animated Feature, Best Original Song (Remember Me), A+ CinemaScore
